patch.value: MCP pm_context crashes on caller-supplied projection flags (compact/brief/fields/includeBody)

Fixed: pm_context downstream passes options to runList; if caller supplies compact/brief/fields/includeBody, the list returns the compact projection (id/status/type/title only) and runContext's toContextFocusItem chokes with `item.tags is not iterable`.

Root cause: context.ts forwards full options dict to runList without stripping projection flags.

Fix: src/cli/commands/context.ts — added stripListProjectionFlags() helper that removes compact/brief/fields/includeBody/include_body before forwarding, applied to both the list query and calendar query. Also hardened toContextFocusItem() to default tags to [] when missing. Added regression test in tests/unit/context-command.spec.ts.

Severity: blocking — any MCP caller passing common projection options gets a hard crash. Discovered in 2026-05-17 dogfood session.

Fixed in 46a225b: stripListProjectionFlags() removes compact/brief/fields/includeBody/include_body before runList/runCalendar; toContextFocusItem hardened to default tags to []; regression test covers all known projection-flag permutations. All 1319 tests pass.

author: codex-agent
